inline_comments.message: Is there a real change here?

I think the change should be to remove common-modules.version property and use ${project.version} instead on the affected pom.xmls.

The problem with this change is while it will work for staging builds, and release builds (which we don't have none for 1.1.0).   It won't be accurate for snapshot builds. It will also require maintenance when we go to next release.

So, I think, provided that as of now, in ONAP, the version number of commons move along with the same number as the other engine, drools, ..  ${project.version} is the one to be used.
